if.test: params != null and params.excludeHospitalIds != null and params.excludeHospitalIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.roleSupplierIds != null and params.roleSupplierIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.scopePairBlock != null and (params.scopePairBlock == true or params.scopePairBlock == 'true')
params != null and params.scopePairs != null and params.scopePairs.size() > 0
params != null and params.excludeHospitalIds != null and params.excludeHospitalIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.roleSupplierIds != null and params.roleSupplierIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.scopePairBlock != null and (params.scopePairBlock == true or params.scopePairBlock == 'true')
params != null and params.scopePairs != null and params.scopePairs.size() > 0
params != null and params.excludeHospitalIds != null and params.excludeHospitalIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.roleSupplierIds != null and params.roleSupplierIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.scopePairBlock != null and (params.scopePairBlock == true or params.scopePairBlock == 'true')
params != null and params.scopePairs != null and params.scopePairs.size() > 0

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scm_delivery d WHERE (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scm_order o WHERE o.order_status != '4'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scm_settlement s WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS monthKey, IFNULL(SUM(o.order_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orderCount FROM scm_order o WHERE o.order_status != '4' AND o.order_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') >= #{trendStartMonth}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY monthKey

SELECT IFNULL(sup.company_name, CONCAT('供应商', d.supplier_id)) AS supplierName, IFNULL(SUM(d.delivery_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM scm_delivery d LEFT JOIN scm_supplier sup ON sup.supplier_id = d.supplier_id WHERE (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') AND d.create_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(d.create_time, '%Y-%m') >= #{trendStartMonth}
GROUP BY d.supplier_id, sup.company_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT IFNULL(mc.category_name, '未分类') AS categoryName, IFNULL(SUM(dd.amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id LEFT JOIN scm_material_dict md ON md.material_id = dd.material_id LEFT JOIN scm_material_category mc ON mc.category_id = md.category_id AND (mc.del_flag IS NULL OR mc.del_flag = '0') WHERE (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') AND d.create_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(d.create_time, '%Y-%m') >= #{trendStartMonth}
GROUP BY IFNULL(mc.category_name, '未分类') ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 8
